## New Paper Request

### Paper ID (proposed)
`qqc-NNN-slug` — e.g. `qqc-002-gate-algebras`

### Title
<!-- Full paper title -->

### Authors
<!-- Names and affiliations -->

### Abstract
<!-- Full abstract — do not paraphrase; use the authored text -->

### Keywords
<!-- Comma-separated -->

### Series Dependencies
<!-- Which earlier papers in the series does this paper depend on? -->

### Status
- [ ] Draft (internal)
- [ ] Preprint (ready to post publicly)
- [ ] Submitted to journal

### Checklist for paper folder

Before opening a PR, confirm all items below are ready:

- [ ] `paper.html` authored and complete
- [ ] `paper.pdf` present (real PDF or placeholder stub)
- [ ] `metadata.json` filled with accurate data (no invented fields)
- [ ] `paper.jats.xml` generated
- [ ] `claims.json` populated with all theorems, definitions, and results
- [ ] `notation.json` populated with all symbols
- [ ] `glossary.json` populated
- [ ] `references.bib` complete
- [ ] `CITATION.cff` complete
- [ ] `artifacts/` directory created
- [ ] `python scripts/validate_papers.py` passes
- [ ] `python scripts/generate_index.py` run and index files updated

### Notes
<!-- Any additional context -->
